evals.prompt: Prep an application for Stripe staff-engineer role.
evals.expected_output: A scaffolded application page + tailored resume + cover letter / pitch + selected portfolio pieces, ready within an hour.

evals.prompt: Need application materials for the Acme referral by Friday.
evals.expected_output: Same as default with the deadline acknowledged in the scaffolded application page.

evals.prompt: Help me apply to this <URL> role.
evals.expected_output: Routes through ingest-application first if not yet captured, then produces tailored materials per the standard prep flow.
